name: gray_code
cpp_unit: long gray_code(long n){ return n ^ (n >> 1); }
mojo_unit:
def gray_code(n: Int) -> Int:
    return n ^ (n >> 1)

name: reverse_in_place
mojo_unit:
def reverse_in_place(mut v: List[Float64]):
    var i = 0
    var j = len(v) - 1
    while i < j:
        var tmp = v[i]
        v[i] = v[j]
        v[j] = tmp
        i += 1
        j -= 1

name: day_kind
mojo_unit:
comptime MON = 0
comptime TUE = 1
comptime WED = 2
comptime THU = 3
comptime FRI = 4
comptime SAT = 5
comptime SUN = 6

def is_weekend(day: Int) -> Int:
    if day == SAT or day == SUN:
        return 1
    return 0

name: turn_right
mojo_unit:
comptime D_NORTH = 0
comptime D_EAST = 1
comptime D_SOUTH = 2
comptime D_WEST = 3

def turn_right(dir: Int) -> Int:
    return (dir + 1) % 4

def turn_left(dir: Int) -> Int:
    return (dir + 3) % 4

name: severity_order
mojo_unit:
comptime DEBUG = 0
comptime INFO = 1
comptime WARN = 2
comptime ERROR = 3
comptime FATAL = 4

def is_at_least(level: Int, threshold: Int) -> Int:
    if level >= threshold:
        return 1
    return 0
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(is_at_least(DEBUG, WARN))
    print(is_at_least(ERROR, WARN))
    print(is_at_least(WARN, WARN))
    print(is_at_least(FATAL, INFO))
    print(is_at_least(INFO, FATAL))

    print(m.secs)

    print(Int(a == a))

name: levenshtein
cpp_unit: int levenshtein(std::string a, std::string b){ int n=(int)a.size(); int m=(int)b.size(); std::vector<int> prev(m+1), cur(m+1); for(int j=0;j<=m;j++) prev[j]=j; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){ cur[0]=i; for(int j=1;j<=m;j++){ int cost=(a[i-1]==b[j-1])?0:1; int d=prev[j]+1; int ins=cur[j-1]+1; int sub=prev[j-1]+cost; int mn=d; if(ins<mn) mn=ins; if(sub<mn) mn=sub; cur[j]=mn; } for(int j=0;j<=m;j++) prev[j]=cur[j]; } return prev[m]; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", levenshtein("kitten", "sitting")); printf("%d
", levenshtein("flaw", "lawn")); printf("%d
", levenshtein("abc", "abc")); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(levenshtein("kitten", "sitting"))
    print(levenshtein("flaw", "lawn"))
    print(levenshtein("abc", "abc"))

name: run_length_encode
cpp_unit: std::string run_length_encode(std::string s){ int n=(int)s.size(); std::string result=""; int i=0; while(i<n){ char c=s[i]; int run=1; while(i+run<n && s[i+run]==c) run++; result+=c; result+=std::to_string(run); i+=run; } return result; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%s
", run_length_encode("aaabbc").c_str()); printf("%s
", run_length_encode("abc").c_str()); printf("%s
", run_length_encode("wwwww").c_str()); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(run_length_encode("aaabbc"))
    print(run_length_encode("abc"))
    print(run_length_encode("wwwww"))

name: swap_nibbles
cpp_unit: uint64_t swap_nibbles(uint64_t b){ uint64_t lo=b&0x0FULL; uint64_t hi=(b>>4)&0x0FULL; return (lo<<4)|hi; }
mojo_unit:
def swap_nibbles(b: UInt64) -> UInt64:
    var lo = b & 0x0F
    var hi = (b >> 4) & 0x0F
    return (lo << 4) | hi
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)swap_nibbles(0x12ULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)swap_nibbles(0xABULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)swap_nibbles(0x0FULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)swap_nibbles(0xF0ULL)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(swap_nibbles(0x12))
    print(swap_nibbles(0xAB))
    print(swap_nibbles(0x0F))
    print(swap_nibbles(0xF0))

name: fraction_reduce_num
cpp_unit:
long gcd3(long a, long b){ while(b!=0){ long t=b; b=a%b; a=t; } return a; }
long reduce_num(long num, long den){ long g=gcd3(num<0?-num:num, den<0?-den:den); if(g==0) return num; return num/g; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", reduce_num(6,8)); printf("%ld
", reduce_num(15,25)); printf("%ld
", reduce_num(7,3)); printf("%ld
", reduce_num(100,40)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(reduce_num(6, 8))
    print(reduce_num(15, 25))
    print(reduce_num(7, 3))
    print(reduce_num(100, 40))

name: dispatch_op
cpp_unit: long dispatch_op(int op, long a, long b){ switch(op){ case 0: return a+b; case 1: return a-b; case 2: return a*b; case 3: return (b!=0)? a/b : 0; default: return -1; } }

name: collatz_steps_capped
cpp_unit: long collatz(long n, long cap){ long steps=0; while(n!=1 && steps<cap){ if(n%2==0) n/=2; else n=3*n+1; steps++; } return steps; }

name: log_interp
cpp_unit: double log_interp(double x0,double y0,double x1,double y1,double x){ double lx0=log(x0), lx1=log(x1), lx=log(x); double t=(lx-lx0)/(lx1-lx0); return y0 + (y1-y0)*t; }

name: weighted_mean3
cpp_unit: double weighted_mean3(double a,double wa,double b,double wb,double c,double wc){ return (a*wa+b*wb+c*wc)/(wa+wb+wc); }
mojo_unit:
def weighted_mean3(a: Float64, wa: Float64, b: Float64, wb: Float64, c: Float64, wc: Float64) -> Float64:
    return (a * wa + b * wb + c * wc) / (wa + wb + wc)
